subject: A hazy aerial view of the spired Ravnican cityscape — gothic towers, pinnacles, and rooftops fading into atmospheric mist, with cables or rigging strung between distant structures
description: A muted blue-grey panorama of the city of Ravnica seen from above. Gothic spires and clustered tower blocks recede into atmospheric haze, their silhouettes broken by what appear to be tensioned cables or cords strung across the sky between distant buildings. The palette is desaturated — slate blue, dusk blue, soft warm tan in the upper-mid band where sunlight breaks through cloud. There are no figures. The mood is atmospheric, contemplative, urban-fantasy — a city of guilds rendered as quiet skyline rather than action.
foreground: tensioned cables or cords strung between distant rooftops
background: receding gothic cityscape fading into atmospheric haze
